**Services:** metrics-collector, export-pipeline, session-manager, audit-logger, report-builder, search-indexer, auth-service, notification-daemon, webhook-relay, scheduler-core, billing-worker, ingest-api, cache-warmer, user-profile-service, payment-gateway across green/blue pools, canary, staging, production, QA, dev sandbox.

**Operations completed:** Comprehensive cycle (drain, scale, restart, upgrade, downgrade, patch, migrate, pause/resume, health-check, rollback, reconfigure). Outcomes: alerts cleared, queues drained, memory/CPU normalized, no customer impact, some warnings emitted, manual retries required, documentation/runbooks updated, postmortem notes added, config tasks filed.

**Recent activity:** Extensive operations across all services/environments. Multiple manual retries: metrics-collector staging 16:20, auth-service 09:15, scheduler-core mid-afternoon, billing-worker production 16:20, ingest-api green 16:20. Notable: scheduler-core recovered after stalls; search-indexer rollback longer than expected; ingest-api reduced memory pressure; auth-service/scheduler-core thresholds flagged for revisit; user-profile-service production alert cleared; webhook-relay/notification-daemon warnings; multiple config tidying tasks filed.
